manifest.title: CiTT MATLAB Popup Tutor
manifest.description: MATLAB-native popup tutor contract for BME circuits and signal-conditioning labs. The API returns generated artifacts, focus maps, probe plans, and lab-delta comparisons without requiring MATLAB in CI.

labs.title: RC anti-aliasing before ADC
labs.objective: Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.
assumptions: The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.
The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.
The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data.
idealizations: No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.
Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.
ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet.
labs.bme_safety_boundary: This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.

labs.title: Instrumentation amplifier intro
labs.objective: Preview the future popup workflow for differential/common-mode reasoning and feedback-loop highlighting.
assumptions: Ideal op-amps in the stub artifact.
Matched resistor ratios for common-mode rejection.
idealizations: No finite CMRR or input bias simulation in the stub.
labs.bme_safety_boundary: Human-connected instrumentation requires isolation, leakage-current limits, and approved medical-safety design practices.

manifest.ci_boundary: Generated artifacts, plans, and JSON manifests are testable without MATLAB installed.
manifest.source_of_truth_rule: LLM prose is not the numerical authority; tutoring is grounded in explicit models, hand checks, generated artifacts, simulation evidence, and student-visible reasoning steps.

lab.title: RC anti-aliasing before ADC
lab.objective: Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.
assumptions: The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.
The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.
The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data.
idealizations: No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.
Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.
ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet.
lab.bme_safety_boundary: This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.

overview.title: RC anti-aliasing before ADC
overview.objective: Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.
assumptions: The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.
The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.
The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data.
idealizations: No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.
Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.
ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet.
overview.bme_safety_boundary: This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.

teach_steps.title: Trace the signal chain
teach_steps.prompt_before_reveal: Before calculating, point to where the ECG-like signal, 60 Hz interference, filter, sampler, and output each live.
teach_steps.explanation: Anti-aliasing is a chain problem: the analog filter changes the waveform before the sampler sees it.
common_mistakes: Treating the sampler as if it can remove analog interference by itself.
Looking only at the output without checking the input path.

teach_steps.title: Calculate the RC cutoff
teach_steps.prompt_before_reveal: Predict whether the cutoff should use R*C or 2*pi*R*C.
teach_steps.explanation: For a first-order RC low-pass, fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) in Hz and omega_c = 1/(R*C) in rad/s.
common_mistakes: Using omega_c as if it were Hz.

teach_steps.title: Connect cutoff to sampling
teach_steps.prompt_before_reveal: Compare 60 Hz, the cutoff, and Nyquist before looking at the sampled plot.
teach_steps.explanation: The RC stage should reduce the 60 Hz component before the ADC-facing samples are interpreted.
common_mistakes: Checking Nyquist but forgetting the analog filter response.
Comparing sampled output to hand cutoff at a different measurement point.

focus_map.title: Signal flow overview

target.label: Input to filter to sampler to output
target.description: Whole-model path students should understand before probing.

focus_map.reason: The student needs the map before interpreting any local value.
future_simulink_actions: Highlight the full signal path from source through RC filter to sampling stage.
Future MATLAB plugin may call hilite_system on connected blocks and lines.
focus_map.student_prompt: Where does the anti-aliasing decision happen in this chain?

focus_map.title: Input path

target.label: ECG-like signal plus 60 Hz interference
target.description: The signal before the RC stage.

focus_map.reason: Students should see that the unwanted 60 Hz component enters before filtering.
future_simulink_actions: Highlight the source block and line into the RC subsystem.
focus_map.student_prompt: Which frequency component do you expect the filter to reduce more?

focus_map.title: RC filter

target.label: R-C low-pass stage
target.description: The first-order low-pass stage that sets cutoff.

focus_map.reason: This is where fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) becomes a model parameter.
future_simulink_actions: Highlight the RC subsystem and its parameter annotation.
focus_map.student_prompt: What happens to fc if C is accidentally entered in uF instead of nF?

focus_map.title: Sampling stage

target.label: ADC sampling stage
target.description: The point where Nyquist and sample time matter.

focus_map.reason: Filtering must be interpreted relative to fs and Nyquist.
future_simulink_actions: Highlight the zero-order hold or ADC sample block.
focus_map.student_prompt: How does Nyquist compare with the 60 Hz interference?

focus_map.title: Output signal

target.label: Filtered and sampled output
target.description: The waveform sent to downstream analysis.

focus_map.reason: This is the student-visible consequence of the filter and sampler.
future_simulink_actions: Highlight the logged output line and scope block.
focus_map.student_prompt: What visual change should the filtered output show compared with the input?

focus_map.title: Lab Delta measurement point

target.label: RC output measurement
target.description: The probe point used to compare hand, simulation, and lab values.

focus_map.reason: Lab Delta is only meaningful if all three values refer to the same point.
future_simulink_actions: Attach logging or a voltage probe at the RC output port.
focus_map.student_prompt: Are your hand value, simulation value, and measured value all taken at this point?

probe_plan.title: Add voltage probe at RC output
probe_plan.student_goal: Inspect the local signal after the low-pass stage and before sampling.
probe_plan.expected_behavior: The 60 Hz component should be smaller after the RC stage.
probe_plan.student_question: Does the measured output match the cutoff you calculated by hand?
probe_plan.measurement_explanation: This probe checks the exact point where the filter output is handed to the sampling stage.
suggested_sensor_insertion: Voltage sensor from vout to ground in a future Simscape model.
future_matlab_steps: Enable signal logging on the RC output line.
Add a scope or logged signal named rc_filter_output.
Associate the log with focus_map entry lab_delta_measurement_point.
matlab_comment_lines: % CiTT Probe tab: add voltage probe at RC output.

probe_plan.title: Compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component
probe_plan.student_goal: Estimate how much interference remains at the ADC input.

target.label: 60 Hz before/after comparison
target.simulink_path: citt_rc_antialias_adc/Input Path to RC Filter Output

probe_plan.expected_behavior: The post-filter 60 Hz amplitude should be lower than the input amplitude.
probe_plan.student_question: Is 60 Hz far enough above cutoff to be meaningfully reduced?
probe_plan.measurement_explanation: This separates filter behavior from sampling behavior before discussing aliasing.
future_matlab_steps: Compute or estimate the 60 Hz component in both logged signals.
Show the comparison in the Probe tab before Lab Delta diagnosis.
matlab_comment_lines: % CiTT Probe tab: compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component.

probe_plan.title: Log sampled output
probe_plan.student_goal: Inspect what the ADC-facing data stream would contain.
probe_plan.expected_behavior: Samples should follow the filtered waveform at 500 Hz.
probe_plan.student_question: Does the sampled waveform preserve the filtered signal without alias surprises?
probe_plan.measurement_explanation: This probe connects the analog filter output to the ADC learning objective.
future_matlab_steps: Log the zero-order hold or ADC output line.
Compare sampled_output against filtered_output at the same timestamps.
matlab_comment_lines: % CiTT Probe tab: log sampled output for ADC comparison.

lab_delta_seed_request.notes: Seed example intentionally shows angular frequency reported as Hz.

required_matlab_products: Simscape Electrical for future sensor insertion templates
supported_now: Fetch and render the typed plugin manifest.
Fetch generated MATLAB script text and dry-run Simulink build plans.
Render four popup tabs from JSON without MATLAB execution.
Map focus entries to current SVG targets or future Simulink paths.
Render probe plans and Lab Delta comparison suggestions.
future_runtime_hooks: Launch MATLAB App Designer popup with command: citt.
Call hilite_system for block, line, port, and annotation targets after a model exists.
Insert signal logging or Simscape sensors from ProbePlan entries.
Run MATLAB/Simulink simulations through an optional local adapter.
Package +citt/, templates/, examples/, docs/, and app/ into a .mltbx toolbox.

agent_actions.label: Load plugin manifest
agent_actions.expected_output: Four tabs and available lab summaries.
agent_actions.dry_run_note: This is fully supported by the current API.

agent_actions.label: Render Overview tab
agent_actions.expected_output: Student-facing lab map with inputs, outputs, assumptions, and evidence.
agent_actions.dry_run_note: No MATLAB runtime is needed to render this tab.

agent_actions.label: Render Teach tab
agent_actions.dry_run_note: Use generated hand-check text and focus-map metadata only.

agent_actions.label: Highlight model focus
agent_actions.expected_output: Highlighted SVG target today or Simulink target in a future adapter.
agent_actions.dry_run_note: Current API returns highlight plans; it must not claim hilite_system ran.

agent_actions.label: Insert or log probe
agent_actions.expected_output: Signal logging or sensor insertion plan.
agent_actions.dry_run_note: Current API returns deterministic probe plans and MATLAB comments only.

agent_actions.label: Run simulation
agent_actions.dry_run_note: Current CI must not execute MATLAB; use generated text and deterministic hand checks.

agent_actions.label: Compare hand, simulation, and measured values
agent_actions.expected_output: Comparison rows, likely causes, next check, and reflection question.
agent_actions.dry_run_note: This is supported by deterministic Python heuristics.

agent_actions.label: Refuse unsupported runtime claims
inputs: Any request requiring unconfigured MATLAB execution
agent_actions.dry_run_note: Do not fabricate MATLAB, Simulink, or bench results.

refusal_rules: Do not claim that MATLAB, Simulink, Simscape, hilite_system, or .mltbx packaging ran unless a future adapter reports that execution evidence.
Do not turn LLM prose into final numerical answers.
Do not diagnose biomedical safety or patient-connected device compliance.
If a model region cannot be mapped to a focus target, return a clear missing-map message.
If measured data uses unknown units or measurement points, ask for clarification before ranking causes strongly.
ci_validation: Validate JSON serialization of manifest, lab plan, adapter plan, artifacts, focus map, probe plan, and Lab Delta response.
Inspect generated MATLAB script text for hand-check formulas and named outputs.
Verify dry-run plans set requires_matlab_runtime=false at bundle level.
Verify runtime action steps are marked requires_matlab_runtime=true when they would need MATLAB later.

artifacts.title: RC anti-aliasing MATLAB script
artifacts.description: Dry-run MATLAB script artifact for hand cutoff checks, simple filter simulation, plots, and future popup tab hooks.

artifacts.title: Simulink build-script plan
artifacts.description: Placeholder build plan describing blocks, lines, logging, and highlight targets. It does not require MATLAB in CI.
artifacts.content:
% CiTT Simulink build-script plan for RC anti-aliasing before ADC
% This artifact describes a future build path; Python tests inspect text only.
% Future MATLAB plugin may call hilite_system for these blocks/lines.
% This artifact only describes the highlight plan; it does not require MATLAB in CI.
%
% Planned blocks:
%   input_path: ECG-like signal source plus 60 Hz interference
%   rc_filter: first-order RC low-pass subsystem
%   sampling_stage: zero-order hold / ADC sample stage
%   output_signal: logged sampled waveform
%
% Planned lines:
%   input_path -> rc_filter
%   rc_filter -> sampling_stage
%   sampling_stage -> output_signal
%
% Planned logs:
%   log_signal('input_path')
%   log_signal('rc_filter_output')
%   log_signal('sampled_output')
%
% Future Simulink highlight: input_path
% Future Simulink highlight: rc_filter
% Future Simulink highlight: sampling_stage
% Future Simulink highlight: output_signal

files.description: Top-level MATLAB launcher so students can type citt after adding the bundle directory to the MATLAB path.
Package-level MATLAB launcher alias. It loads bundled JSON instead of requiring a local server.
Loads bundled manifest, lab plan, artifact index, and Lab Delta example from local JSON files.
Opens the four-tab MATLAB popup using bundled offline lab data.
Renderer stub for the Overview tab data contract.
Renderer stub for Teach tab steps and focus entries.
Renderer stub for Probe tab plans.
Renderer stub for Lab Delta comparison examples.

files.content:
{
  "api_prefix": "/matlab_plugin",
  "ci_boundary": "Generated artifacts, plans, and JSON manifests are testable without MATLAB installed.",
  "default_deployment_mode": "offline_toolbox",
  "deployment_modes": [
    "offline_toolbox",
    "optional_api",
    "web_preview"
  ],
  "description": "MATLAB-native popup tutor contract for BME circuits and signal-conditioning labs. The API returns generated artifacts, focus maps, probe plans, and lab-delta comparisons without requiring MATLAB in CI.",
  "labs": [
    {
      "assumptions": [
        "The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.",
        "The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.",
        "The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data."
      ],
      "bme_safety_boundary": "This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.",
      "evidence_to_collect": [
        "Calculated cutoff frequency",
        "Nyquist frequency",
        "Input and filtered waveforms",
        "Sampled output waveform",
        "Lab Delta comparison rows"
      ],
      "generated_artifact_kinds": [
        "matlab_script",
        "simulink_build_script",
        "focus_map_json",
        "probe_plan_json",
        "app_designer_plan",
        "toolbox_manifest"
      ],
      "id": "rc_antialias_adc",
      "idealizations": [
        "No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.",
        "Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.",
        "ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet."
      ],
      "inputs": [
        "ECG-like low-frequency signal",
        "60 Hz interference",
        "Sampling rate"
      ],
      "key_parameters": {
        "C": "100 nF",
        "R": "39.7887358 kOhm",
        "fs": "500 Hz",
        "target_fc": "40 Hz"
      },
      "objective": "Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.",
      "outputs": [
        "Filtered RC output",
        "Sampled ADC input waveform",
        "Hand/simulation/lab cutoff comparison"
      ],
      "status": "implemented",
      "tabs": [
        "overview",
        "teach",
        "probe",
        "lab_delta"
      ],
      "title": "RC anti-aliasing before ADC"
    },
    {
      "assumptions": [
        "Ideal op-amps in the stub artifact.",
        "Matched resistor ratios for common-mode rejection."
      ],
      "bme_safety_boundary": "Human-connected instrumentation requires isolation, leakage-current limits, and approved medical-safety design practices.",
      "evidence_to_collect": [
        "Gain formula hand check",
        "Differential/common-mode explanation",
        "Feedback-loop highlight plan"
      ],
      "generated_artifact_kinds": [
        "matlab_script",
        "focus_map_json",
        "probe_plan_json",
        "app_designer_plan",
        "toolbox_manifest"
      ],
      "id": "instrumentation_amplifier_intro",
      "idealizations": [
        "No finite CMRR or input bias simulation in the stub.",
        "No live Simulink execution yet."
      ],
      "inputs": [
        "Differential sensor voltage",
        "Common-mode voltage",
        "Gain-setting resistor"
      ],
      "key_parameters": {
        "gain": "1 + 2R/Rg",
        "v_common": "1 V",
        "v_diff": "1 mV"
      },
      "objective": "Preview the future popup workflow for differential/common-mode reasoning and feedback-loop highlighting.",
      "outputs": [
        "Ideal differential output",
        "Common-mode teaching note",
        "Feedback-loop focus map"
      ],
      "status": "stub",
      "tabs": [
        "overview",
        "teach",
        "probe",
        "lab_delta"
      ],
      "title": "Instrumentation amplifier intro"
    }
  ],
  "local_server_required": false,
  "matlab_entrypoint": "citt",
  "plugin_id": "citt_matlab_popup_tutor",
  "source_of_truth_rule": "LLM prose is not the numerical authority; tutoring is grounded in explicit models, hand checks, generated artifacts, simulation evidence, and student-visible reasoning steps.",
  "tabs": [
    "overview",
    "teach",
    "probe",
    "lab_delta"
  ],
  "title": "CiTT MATLAB Popup Tutor",
  "version": "0.1.0"
}
files.description: Bundled plugin manifest for offline MATLAB use.

files.content:
{
  "adapter_plan": {
    "adapter_id": "matlab_app_designer_adapter_v1",
    "agent_actions": [
      {
        "action_kind": "fetch_manifest",
        "dry_run_note": "This is fully supported by the current API.",
        "expected_output": "Four tabs and available lab summaries.",
        "id": "load_manifest",
        "inputs": [
          "GET /matlab_plugin/manifest"
        ],
        "label": "Load plugin manifest",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": false,
        "tab": "overview"
      },
      {
        "action_kind": "render_tab",
        "dry_run_note": "No MATLAB runtime is needed to render this tab.",
        "expected_output": "Student-facing lab map with inputs, outputs, assumptions, and evidence.",
        "id": "render_overview",
        "inputs": [
          "MatlabLabSummary",
          "overview payload"
        ],
        "label": "Render Overview tab",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": false,
        "tab": "overview"
      },
      {
        "action_kind": "render_tab",
        "dry_run_note": "Use generated hand-check text and focus-map metadata only.",
        "expected_output": "Prompt-before-reveal steps and focus targets.",
        "id": "render_teach",
        "inputs": [
          "MatlabTeachStep[]",
          "FocusMapEntry[]"
        ],
        "label": "Render Teach tab",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": false,
        "tab": "teach"
      },
      {
        "action_kind": "highlight_target",
        "dry_run_note": "Current API returns highlight plans; it must not claim hilite_system ran.",
        "expected_output": "Highlighted SVG target today or Simulink target in a future adapter.",
        "id": "highlight_focus",
        "inputs": [
          "FocusMapEntry.target"
        ],
        "label": "Highlight model focus",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": true,
        "tab": "teach"
      },
      {
        "action_kind": "insert_probe",
        "dry_run_note": "Current API returns deterministic probe plans and MATLAB comments only.",
        "expected_output": "Signal logging or sensor insertion plan.",
        "id": "insert_probe",
        "inputs": [
          "ProbePlan"
        ],
        "label": "Insert or log probe",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": true,
        "tab": "probe"
      },
      {
        "action_kind": "run_simulation",
        "dry_run_note": "Current CI must not execute MATLAB; use generated text and deterministic hand checks.",
        "expected_output": "Simulation evidence for the popup.",
        "id": "run_simulation",
        "inputs": [
          "MATLAB script artifact",
          "future Simulink model"
        ],
        "label": "Run simulation",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": true,
        "tab": "probe"
      },
      {
        "action_kind": "compare_lab_delta",
        "dry_run_note": "This is supported by deterministic Python heuristics.",
        "expected_output": "Comparison rows, likely causes, next check, and reflection question.",
        "id": "compare_lab_delta",
        "inputs": [
          "LabDeltaRequest"
        ],
        "label": "Compare hand, simulation, and measured values",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": false,
        "tab": "lab_delta"
      },
      {
        "action_kind": "refuse_unsupported",
        "dry_run_note": "Do not fabricate MATLAB, Simulink, or bench results.",
        "expected_output": "Clear unsupported/future-adapter message.",
        "id": "refuse_unsupported",
        "inputs": [
          "Any request requiring unconfigured MATLAB execution"
        ],
        "label": "Refuse unsupported runtime claims",
        "requires_matlab_runtime": false,
        "tab": null
      }
    ],
    "ci_validation": [
      "Validate JSON serialization of manifest, lab plan, adapter plan, artifacts, focus map, probe plan, and Lab Delta response.",
      "Inspect generated MATLAB script text for hand-check formulas and named outputs.",
      "Verify dry-run plans set requires_matlab_runtime=false at bundle level.",
      "Verify runtime action steps are marked requires_matlab_runtime=true when they would need MATLAB later."
    ],
    "future_runtime_hooks": [
      "Launch MATLAB App Designer popup with command: citt.",
      "Call hilite_system for block, line, port, and annotation targets after a model exists.",
      "Insert signal logging or Simscape sensors from ProbePlan entries.",
      "Run MATLAB/Simulink simulations through an optional local adapter.",
      "Package +citt/, templates/, examples/, docs/, and app/ into a .mltbx toolbox."
    ],
    "lab_id": "rc_antialias_adc",
    "launch_command": "citt",
    "mode": "dry_run_contract",
    "refusal_rules": [
      "Do not claim that MATLAB, Simulink, Simscape, hilite_system, or .mltbx packaging ran unless a future adapter reports that execution evidence.",
      "Do not turn LLM prose into final numerical answers.",
      "Do not diagnose biomedical safety or patient-connected device compliance.",
      "If a model region cannot be mapped to a focus target, return a clear missing-map message.",
      "If measured data uses unknown units or measurement points, ask for clarification before ranking causes strongly."
    ],
    "required_matlab_products": [
      "MATLAB",
      "Simulink for future runtime execution",
      "Simscape Electrical for future sensor insertion templates"
    ],
    "supported_now": [
      "Fetch and render the typed plugin manifest.",
      "Fetch generated MATLAB script text and dry-run Simulink build plans.",
      "Render four popup tabs from JSON without MATLAB execution.",
      "Map focus entries to current SVG targets or future Simulink paths.",
      "Render probe plans and Lab Delta comparison suggestions."
    ]
  },
  "expected_artifact_kinds": [
    "matlab_script",
    "simulink_build_script",
    "focus_map_json",
    "probe_plan_json",
    "app_designer_plan",
    "toolbox_manifest"
  ],
  "focus_map": [
    {
      "current_svg_components": [
        "VSIG",
        "R",
        "C"
      ],
      "current_svg_goals": [],
      "current_svg_nodes": [
        "vin",
        "vout",
        "0"
      ],
      "future_simulink_actions": [
        "Highlight the full signal path from source through RC filter to sampling stage.",
        "Future MATLAB plugin may call hilite_system on connected blocks and lines."
      ],
      "id": "overview_signal_flow",
      "reason": "The student needs the map before interpreting any local value.",
      "student_prompt": "Where does the anti-aliasing decision happen in this chain?",
      "surfaces": [
        "web_svg",
        "simulink",
        "conceptual"
      ],
      "tab": "overview",
      "target": {
        "description": "Whole-model path students should understand before probing.",
        "id": "overview_signal_flow",
        "label": "Input to filter to sampler to output",
        "port": null,
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc",
        "svg_id": null,
        "target_path": "input_path->rc_filter->sampling_stage->output_signal",
        "target_type": "conceptual_path"
      },
      "teaching_step_id": "overview",
      "title": "Signal flow overview"
    },
    {
      "current_svg_components": [
        "VSIG"
      ],
      "current_svg_goals": [],
      "current_svg_nodes": [
        "vin"
      ],
      "future_simulink_actions": [
        "Highlight the source block and line into the RC subsystem."
      ],
      "id": "input_path",
      "reason": "Students should see that the unwanted 60 Hz component enters before filtering.",
      "student_prompt": "Which frequency component do you expect the filter to reduce more?",
      "surfaces": [
        "web_svg",
        "simulink"
      ],
      "tab": "teach",
      "target": {
        "description": "The signal before the RC stage.",
        "id": "input_path",
        "label": "ECG-like signal plus 60 Hz interference",
        "port": null,
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/Input Path",
        "svg_id": "VSIG",
        "target_path": "input_path",
        "target_type": "line"
      },
      "teaching_step_id": "identify_input",
      "title": "Input path"
    },
    {
      "current_svg_components": [
        "R",
        "C"
      ],
      "current_svg_goals": [],
      "current_svg_nodes": [
        "vout",
        "0"
      ],
      "future_simulink_actions": [
        "Highlight the RC subsystem and its parameter annotation."
      ],
      "id": "rc_filter",
      "reason": "This is where fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) becomes a model parameter.",
      "student_prompt": "What happens to fc if C is accidentally entered in uF instead of nF?",
      "surfaces": [
        "web_svg",
        "simulink"
      ],
      "tab": "teach",
      "target": {
        "description": "The first-order low-pass stage that sets cutoff.",
        "id": "rc_filter",
        "label": "R-C low-pass stage",
        "port": null,
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/RC Filter",
        "svg_id": "R,C",
        "target_path": "rc_filter",
        "target_type": "block"
      },
      "teaching_step_id": "calculate_cutoff",
      "title": "RC filter"
    },
    {
      "current_svg_components": [],
      "current_svg_goals": [
        "adc_sampled_output"
      ],
      "current_svg_nodes": [],
      "future_simulink_actions": [
        "Highlight the zero-order hold or ADC sample block."
      ],
      "id": "sampling_stage",
      "reason": "Filtering must be interpreted relative to fs and Nyquist.",
      "student_prompt": "How does Nyquist compare with the 60 Hz interference?",
      "surfaces": [
        "simulink",
        "conceptual"
      ],
      "tab": "teach",
      "target": {
        "description": "The point where Nyquist and sample time matter.",
        "id": "sampling_stage",
        "label": "ADC sampling stage",
        "port": null,
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/Sampling Stage",
        "svg_id": null,
        "target_path": "sampling_stage",
        "target_type": "block"
      },
      "teaching_step_id": "connect_to_adc",
      "title": "Sampling stage"
    },
    {
      "current_svg_components": [],
      "current_svg_goals": [
        "vout"
      ],
      "current_svg_nodes": [
        "vout"
      ],
      "future_simulink_actions": [
        "Highlight the logged output line and scope block."
      ],
      "id": "output_signal",
      "reason": "This is the student-visible consequence of the filter and sampler.",
      "student_prompt": "What visual change should the filtered output show compared with the input?",
      "surfaces": [
        "simulink",
        "conceptual"
      ],
      "tab": "teach",
      "target": {
        "description": "The waveform sent to downstream analysis.",
        "id": "output_signal",
        "label": "Filtered and sampled output",
        "port": null,
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/Output Signal",
        "svg_id": null,
        "target_path": "output_signal",
        "target_type": "line"
      },
      "teaching_step_id": "inspect_output",
      "title": "Output signal"
    },
    {
      "current_svg_components": [],
      "current_svg_goals": [
        "cutoff_hz",
        "output_rms_v"
      ],
      "current_svg_nodes": [
        "vout",
        "0"
      ],
      "future_simulink_actions": [
        "Attach logging or a voltage probe at the RC output port."
      ],
      "id": "lab_delta_measurement_point",
      "reason": "Lab Delta is only meaningful if all three values refer to the same point.",
      "student_prompt": "Are your hand value, simulation value, and measured value all taken at this point?",
      "surfaces": [
        "web_svg",
        "simulink"
      ],
      "tab": "lab_delta",
      "target": {
        "description": "The probe point used to compare hand, simulation, and lab values.",
        "id": "lab_delta_measurement_point",
        "label": "RC output measurement",
        "port": "output",
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/RC Filter/1",
        "svg_id": "vout",
        "target_path": "rc_filter/output",
        "target_type": "port"
      },
      "teaching_step_id": "compare_measurements",
      "title": "Lab Delta measurement point"
    }
  ],
  "lab": {
    "assumptions": [
      "The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.",
      "The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.",
      "The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data."
    ],
    "bme_safety_boundary": "This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.",
    "evidence_to_collect": [
      "Calculated cutoff frequency",
      "Nyquist frequency",
      "Input and filtered waveforms",
      "Sampled output waveform",
      "Lab Delta comparison rows"
    ],
    "generated_artifact_kinds": [
      "matlab_script",
      "simulink_build_script",
      "focus_map_json",
      "probe_plan_json",
      "app_designer_plan",
      "toolbox_manifest"
    ],
    "id": "rc_antialias_adc",
    "idealizations": [
      "No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.",
      "Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.",
      "ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet."
    ],
    "inputs": [
      "ECG-like low-frequency signal",
      "60 Hz interference",
      "Sampling rate"
    ],
    "key_parameters": {
      "C": "100 nF",
      "R": "39.7887358 kOhm",
      "fs": "500 Hz",
      "target_fc": "40 Hz"
    },
    "objective": "Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.",
    "outputs": [
      "Filtered RC output",
      "Sampled ADC input waveform",
      "Hand/simulation/lab cutoff comparison"
    ],
    "status": "implemented",
    "tabs": [
      "overview",
      "teach",
      "probe",
      "lab_delta"
    ],
    "title": "RC anti-aliasing before ADC"
  },
  "lab_delta_seed_request": {
    "hand_values": {
      "fc_hz": 40.0
    },
    "measured_values": {
      "fc_hz": 251.32741228718345
    },
    "notes": "Seed example intentionally shows angular frequency reported as Hz.",
    "simulation_values": {
      "fc_hz": 40.1
    },
    "value_units": {
      "fc_hz": "Hz"
    }
  },
  "overview": {
    "assumptions": [
      "The source and ADC input are ideal unless Lab Delta suggests otherwise.",
      "The RC stage is modeled as a first-order low-pass filter.",
      "The example waveform is educational and ECG-like, not patient data."
    ],
    "bme_safety_boundary": "This is a signal-conditioning teaching model, not biomedical safety verification or patient-connected design approval.",
    "evidence_to_collect": [
      "Calculated cutoff frequency",
      "Nyquist frequency",
      "Input and filtered waveforms",
      "Sampled output waveform",
      "Lab Delta comparison rows"
    ],
    "generated_artifacts": [
      "matlab_script",
      "simulink_build_script",
      "focus_map_json",
      "probe_plan_json",
      "app_designer_plan",
      "toolbox_manifest"
    ],
    "idealizations": [
      "No op-amp buffer loading is included in the initial artifact.",
      "Component tolerances are represented as Lab Delta causes, not random simulation.",
      "ADC quantization is summarized instead of modeled as a device datasheet."
    ],
    "inputs": [
      "ECG-like low-frequency signal",
      "60 Hz interference",
      "Sampling rate"
    ],
    "key_parameters": {
      "C": "100 nF",
      "R": "39.7887358 kOhm",
      "fs": "500 Hz",
      "target_fc": "40 Hz"
    },
    "objective": "Connect the hand cutoff calculation to a Simulink-style filter and sampled waveform before an ADC.",
    "outputs": [
      "Filtered RC output",
      "Sampled ADC input waveform",
      "Hand/simulation/lab cutoff comparison"
    ],
    "title": "RC anti-aliasing before ADC"
  },
  "probe_plan": [
    {
      "expected_behavior": "The 60 Hz component should be smaller after the RC stage.",
      "future_matlab_steps": [
        "Enable signal logging on the RC output line.",
        "Add a scope or logged signal named rc_filter_output.",
        "Associate the log with focus_map entry lab_delta_measurement_point."
      ],
      "id": "rc_output_voltage_probe",
      "matlab_comment_lines": [
        "% CiTT Probe tab: add voltage probe at RC output.",
        "% Future Simulink highlight: rc_filter"
      ],
      "measurement_explanation": "This probe checks the exact point where the filter output is handed to the sampling stage.",
      "quantity": "voltage",
      "student_goal": "Inspect the local signal after the low-pass stage and before sampling.",
      "student_question": "Does the measured output match the cutoff you calculated by hand?",
      "suggested_logging": [
        "input_signal",
        "filtered_output"
      ],
      "suggested_sensor_insertion": [
        "Voltage sensor from vout to ground in a future Simscape model."
      ],
      "target": {
        "description": "Voltage at the capacitor/output node.",
        "id": "rc_filter_output",
        "label": "RC filter output",
        "port": "output",
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/RC Filter/1",
        "svg_id": "vout",
        "target_path": "rc_filter/output",
        "target_type": "port"
      },
      "title": "Add voltage probe at RC output",
      "unit": "V"
    },
    {
      "expected_behavior": "The post-filter 60 Hz amplitude should be lower than the input amplitude.",
      "future_matlab_steps": [
        "Compute or estimate the 60 Hz component in both logged signals.",
        "Show the comparison in the Probe tab before Lab Delta diagnosis."
      ],
      "id": "compare_60hz_component",
      "matlab_comment_lines": [
        "% CiTT Probe tab: compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component."
      ],
      "measurement_explanation": "This separates filter behavior from sampling behavior before discussing aliasing.",
      "quantity": "attenuation",
      "student_goal": "Estimate how much interference remains at the ADC input.",
      "student_question": "Is 60 Hz far enough above cutoff to be meaningfully reduced?",
      "suggested_logging": [
        "input_signal",
        "filtered_output"
      ],
      "suggested_sensor_insertion": [],
      "target": {
        "description": "Frequency-component comparison across the filter.",
        "id": "sixty_hz_comparison",
        "label": "60 Hz before/after comparison",
        "port": null,
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/Input Path to RC Filter Output",
        "svg_id": null,
        "target_path": "input_path->rc_filter_output",
        "target_type": "conceptual_path"
      },
      "title": "Compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component",
      "unit": "ratio or dB"
    },
    {
      "expected_behavior": "Samples should follow the filtered waveform at 500 Hz.",
      "future_matlab_steps": [
        "Log the zero-order hold or ADC output line.",
        "Compare sampled_output against filtered_output at the same timestamps."
      ],
      "id": "sampled_output_probe",
      "matlab_comment_lines": [
        "% CiTT Probe tab: log sampled output for ADC comparison.",
        "% Future Simulink highlight: sampling_stage"
      ],
      "measurement_explanation": "This probe connects the analog filter output to the ADC learning objective.",
      "quantity": "sampled voltage",
      "student_goal": "Inspect what the ADC-facing data stream would contain.",
      "student_question": "Does the sampled waveform preserve the filtered signal without alias surprises?",
      "suggested_logging": [
        "sample_times",
        "sampled_output"
      ],
      "suggested_sensor_insertion": [],
      "target": {
        "description": "Output after the sampling stage.",
        "id": "sampled_output",
        "label": "Sampled output",
        "port": null,
        "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/Sampling Stage/1",
        "svg_id": null,
        "target_path": "sampling_stage/output",
        "target_type": "line"
      },
      "title": "Log sampled output",
      "unit": "V"
    }
  ],
  "teach_steps": [
    {
      "common_mistakes": [
        "Treating the sampler as if it can remove analog interference by itself.",
        "Looking only at the output without checking the input path."
      ],
      "explanation": "Anti-aliasing is a chain problem: the analog filter changes the waveform before the sampler sees it.",
      "focus_entry_ids": [
        "overview_signal_flow",
        "input_path",
        "rc_filter",
        "sampling_stage"
      ],
      "id": "overview_signal_flow",
      "prompt_before_reveal": "Before calculating, point to where the ECG-like signal, 60 Hz interference, filter, sampler, and output each live.",
      "reveal_policy": "prompt_first",
      "tab": "teach",
      "title": "Trace the signal chain",
      "verified_value_refs": [
        "fs",
        "target_fc"
      ]
    },
    {
      "common_mistakes": [
        "Using omega_c as if it were Hz.",
        "Dropping the 2*pi factor.",
        "Entering 100 nF as 100 uF."
      ],
      "explanation": "For a first-order RC low-pass, fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) in Hz and omega_c = 1/(R*C) in rad/s.",
      "focus_entry_ids": [
        "rc_filter"
      ],
      "id": "calculate_cutoff",
      "prompt_before_reveal": "Predict whether the cutoff should use R*C or 2*pi*R*C.",
      "reveal_policy": "show_hand_check",
      "tab": "teach",
      "title": "Calculate the RC cutoff",
      "verified_value_refs": [
        "hand_fc_hz",
        "nyquist"
      ]
    },
    {
      "common_mistakes": [
        "Checking Nyquist but forgetting the analog filter response.",
        "Comparing sampled output to hand cutoff at a different measurement point."
      ],
      "explanation": "The RC stage should reduce the 60 Hz component before the ADC-facing samples are interpreted.",
      "focus_entry_ids": [
        "sampling_stage",
        "output_signal"
      ],
      "id": "connect_to_sampling",
      "prompt_before_reveal": "Compare 60 Hz, the cutoff, and Nyquist before looking at the sampled plot.",
      "reveal_policy": "show_simulation_evidence",
      "tab": "teach",
      "title": "Connect cutoff to sampling",
      "verified_value_refs": [
        "attenuation_at_60_hz"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
files.description: Bundled four-tab lab plan for offline MATLAB use.

files.content:
[
  {
    "filename": "citt_rc_antialias_adc.m",
    "id": "rc_antialias_adc_matlab_script",
    "kind": "matlab_script",
    "path": "examples/rc_antialias_adc/artifacts/citt_rc_antialias_adc.m",
    "requires_matlab_runtime": false
  },
  {
    "filename": "citt_rc_antialias_adc_simulink_plan.m",
    "id": "rc_antialias_adc_simulink_plan",
    "kind": "simulink_build_script",
    "path": "examples/rc_antialias_adc/artifacts/citt_rc_antialias_adc_simulink_plan.m",
    "requires_matlab_runtime": false
  },
  {
    "filename": "citt_rc_antialias_adc_app_designer_plan.json",
    "id": "rc_antialias_adc_app_designer_plan",
    "kind": "app_designer_plan",
    "path": "examples/rc_antialias_adc/artifacts/citt_rc_antialias_adc_app_designer_plan.json",
    "requires_matlab_runtime": false
  },
  {
    "filename": "citt_rc_antialias_adc_toolbox_manifest.json",
    "id": "rc_antialias_adc_toolbox_manifest",

# CiTT Offline-First MATLAB Plugin

The MATLAB plugin path loads bundled JSON and generated artifacts from the toolbox. A local FastAPI server is optional for development, web preview, or artifact refresh; it is not required for the student-facing MATLAB popup.
files.description: Short note explaining that the MATLAB plugin does not require a local server.
Dry-run MATLAB script artifact for hand cutoff checks, simple filter simulation, plots, and future popup tab hooks.

files.content:
% CiTT Simulink build-script plan for RC anti-aliasing before ADC
% This artifact describes a future build path; Python tests inspect text only.
% Future MATLAB plugin may call hilite_system for these blocks/lines.
% This artifact only describes the highlight plan; it does not require MATLAB in CI.
%
% Planned blocks:
%   input_path: ECG-like signal source plus 60 Hz interference
%   rc_filter: first-order RC low-pass subsystem
%   sampling_stage: zero-order hold / ADC sample stage
%   output_signal: logged sampled waveform
%
% Planned lines:
%   input_path -> rc_filter
%   rc_filter -> sampling_stage
%   sampling_stage -> output_signal
%
% Planned logs:
%   log_signal('input_path')
%   log_signal('rc_filter_output')
%   log_signal('sampled_output')
%
% Future Simulink highlight: input_path
% Future Simulink highlight: rc_filter
% Future Simulink highlight: sampling_stage
% Future Simulink highlight: output_signal
files.description: Placeholder build plan describing blocks, lines, logging, and highlight targets. It does not require MATLAB in CI.
JSON plan for the future MATLAB App Designer popup.
Dry-run manifest for a future MATLAB toolbox package.

[
  {
    "expected_behavior": "The 60 Hz component should be smaller after the RC stage.",
    "future_matlab_steps": [
      "Enable signal logging on the RC output line.",
      "Add a scope or logged signal named rc_filter_output.",
      "Associate the log with focus_map entry lab_delta_measurement_point."
    ],
    "id": "rc_output_voltage_probe",
    "matlab_comment_lines": [
      "% CiTT Probe tab: add voltage probe at RC output.",
      "% Future Simulink highlight: rc_filter"
    ],
    "measurement_explanation": "This probe checks the exact point where the filter output is handed to the sampling stage.",
    "quantity": "voltage",
    "student_goal": "Inspect the local signal after the low-pass stage and before sampling.",
    "student_question": "Does the measured output match the cutoff you calculated by hand?",
    "suggested_logging": [
      "input_signal",
      "filtered_output"
    ],
    "suggested_sensor_insertion": [
      "Voltage sensor from vout to ground in a future Simscape model."
    ],
    "target": {
      "description": "Voltage at the capacitor/output node.",
      "id": "rc_filter_output",
      "label": "RC filter output",
      "port": "output",
      "simulink_path": "citt_rc_antialias_adc/RC Filter/1",
      "svg_id": "vout",
      "target_path": "rc_filter/output",
      "target_type": "port"
    },
    "title": "Add voltage probe at RC output",
    "unit": "V"
  },
  {
    "expected_behavior": "The post-filter 60 Hz amplitude should be lower than the input amplitude.",
    "future_matlab_steps": [
      "Compute or estimate the 60 Hz component in both logged signals.",
      "Show the comparison in the Probe tab before Lab Delta diagnosis."
    ],
    "id": "compare_60hz_component",
    "matlab_comment_lines": [
      "% CiTT Probe tab: compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component."
    ],
    "measurement_explanation": "This separates filter behavior from sampling behavior before discussing aliasing.",
    "quantity": "attenuation",
    "student_goal": "Estimate how much interference remains at the ADC input.",
    "student_question": "Is 60 Hz far enough above cutoff to be meaningfully reduced?",
    "suggested_logging": [
      "input_signal",
      "filtered_output"
    ],
    "suggested_sensor_insertion": [],
    "target": {
      "description": "Frequency-component comparison across the filter.",
      "id": "sixty_hz_comparison",
      "label": "60 Hz before/after comparison",

      "svg_id": null,
      "target_path": "input_path->rc_filter_output",
      "target_type": "conceptual_path"
    },
    "title": "Compare pre-filter and post-filter 60 Hz component",
    "unit": "ratio or dB"
  },
  {
    "expected_behavior": "Samples should follow the filtered waveform at 500 Hz.",
    "future_matlab_steps": [
      "Log the zero-order hold or ADC output line.",
      "Compare sampled_output against filtered_output at the same timestamps."
    ],
    "id": "sampled_output_probe",

      "% CiTT Probe tab: log sampled output for ADC comparison.",
      "% Future Simulink highlight: sampling_stage"
    ],

    "quantity": "sampled voltage",

files.description: Suggested logging, sensor insertion, and student questions for the Probe tab.

comparison_rows.label: Fc Hz
comparison_rows.note: Compared measured against hand for fc_hz.

likely_causes.title: rad/s vs Hz confusion
likely_causes.explanation: One value is near a 2*pi ratio from another value. That often means angular frequency in rad/s was compared with frequency in Hz, or the 2*pi factor was missed.
likely_causes.next_check: Recalculate cutoff using fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) in Hz and compare with omega_c = 1/(R*C) in rad/s.

lab_delta_example.next_probe_suggestion: Probe the RC output voltage and verify R, C, fc, and omega_c units before changing topology.
lab_delta_example.next_check: Recalculate cutoff using fc = 1/(2*pi*R*C) in Hz and compare with omega_c = 1/(R*C) in rad/s.
lab_delta_example.reflection_question: Which single assumption would you test first, and what measurement would make that assumption visible?
notes: Lab Delta suggestions are deterministic teaching heuristics, not bench diagnosis.
Compare values only when they refer to the same node, signal, unit, and measurement window.
Student/lab notes considered: Seed example intentionally shows angular frequency reported as Hz.

integrity_checks: Bundle contains manifest and lab plan JSON.
Bundle contains generated artifacts for the selected lab.
Bundle contains focus map and probe plan through the lab plan.
Bundle includes a top-level citt.m MATLAB launcher and package stubs that open a four-tab popup from local JSON files without a server.
Bundle is offline-first and does not require a local server or MATLAB runtime in CI.
